title: valeriana pratensis subsp. stolonifera
intro: Valeriana pratensis subsp. stolonifera is a subspecies of valerian, a flowering plant that belongs to the family Valerianaceae and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Valeriana pratensis subsp. stolonifera are attributed to its roots, which contain valerenic acid and isovaleric acid, giving it a sedative and anxiolytic effect. The health benefits of this plant include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce muscle spasms and improve sleep quality. Valeriana pratensis subsp. stolonifera can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
